item.title: Kroll | Financial and Risk Advisory Solutions
item.description: As the leading independent provider of financial and risk advisory solutions, Kroll leverages our unique insights, data and technology to help clients stay ahead of complex demands. Click for more details.

item.title: About Kroll | Financial and Risk Advisory | Kroll
item.description: Kroll provides proprietary data, technology and insights to help our clients stay ahead of complex demands related to risk, governance and growth. Learn more.

item.title: Stay Ahead with Kroll — Where Performance Meets Precision
item.description: Kroll is proud to partner with top-tier athletes who embody excellence, integrity and focus—the same qualities that define how we service our clients globally. Learn more.

item.title: Kroll Third Party Global Privacy Policy
item.description: Kroll, LLC, including its affiliates and subsidiaries (collectively "Kroll" or the “Firm”) collects and uses certain information about individuals (“personal data”), including clients, suppliers, business contacts, employees, and others, as needed to conduct its business activities. Read more.

item.title: Publications | Reports, Blogs and Articles | Kroll
item.description: Kroll experts frequently author market, regulatory and industry analyses for clients, in print and digital format. Read our latest publications and reports.

item.title: Restructuring Administration Cases | Kroll
item.description: Restructuring Administration works with clients through every step of their restructurings, no matter the complexity, size, or industry. View our active cases now.

item.title: Search
item.description: As the leading independent provider of risk and financial advisory solutions, Kroll leverages our unique insights, data and technology to help clients stay ahead of complex demands. Click for more details.

item.title: Settlement Administration Cases | Kroll Business Services
item.description: Kroll Settlement Administration provides leading notice and administration services for class action settlements. View our active settlements now.

item.title: UK Restructuring Complaints Procedure
item.description: Kroll UK Restructuring has formal procedures for dealing with complaints and these should be sent to the Vice President in charge of Technical and Compliance at london@duffandphelps.com. Read more about the procedure here.

item.title: Website Accessibility | Kroll
item.description:
Notice of Accessibility

We're Committed to Providing Access to All Individuals

Kroll is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

 
Conformance status

The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA. Kroll is partially conformant with WCAG 2.1 level AA. Partially conformant means that some parts of the content do not fully conform to the accessibility standard.

 
Feedback

We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of the Kroll website. Please let us know if you encounter accessibility barriers on this website through email at marketing@kroll.com

item.title: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) Policy
item.description: This privacy policy and notice for California residents applies solely to visitors, users, and individuals, who reside in the State of California (“consumers” or “you”). We have adopted this notice to comply with the California Consumer Privacy Act of 2018 (“CCPA”).

item.title: Cigna Machine Readable Files | Kroll
item.description: Under the Transparency in Coverage Rule, issued in 2020 by the U.S. Department of Health & Human Services, U.S. Department of Labor and U.S. Department of the Treasury and enforced beginning 7/1/22, U.S. health plans (including those sponsored by employers like Kroll) must publish two separate MRFs.

item.title: Kroll Client Stories and Case Studies
item.description: Explore how we help clients around the world stay ahead of their challenges, create an enduring competitive advantage and ultimately preserve and build value.

item.title: Code of Conduct
item.description: As is true with all great companies, Kroll has a Code of Conduct and Business Ethics policy that helps guide day-to-day business contacts and dealings. Read more.
